source.preservation: The source SWF, decoded XML, and assets/extracted/full are unchanged.

offline_derivation.body: Freeze selectors 143/152/160/186 to the matching showid, blank weapon selector 177, then export the eight action DefineSprites with FFDec sprite:png and sprite:svg.
offline_derivation.weapon: Freeze armor selectors to showid 1 and selector 177 to the matching showid; retain direct 177 placement through all action timelines, except jump_double 539 which retains direct child 538.
offline_derivation.alignment: The selected assets use the outer SVG Flash matrix as a shared registration point. A single scale and global Flash-coordinate bounds are applied to every body and weapon candidate.

runtime.layering: weapon_z_index = -1, so the ZMX1 weapon renders behind the body.
runtime.synchronization: Body and weapon share exactly the same compiled atlas cell per action frame.

cleanup.reason: The earlier two-body/two-weapon probe was a derived selected-asset duplicate. It is replaced by the canonical all-showid candidate root; source and classified libraries are unchanged.

open_questions: Equipment display names are deliberately neutral showid labels until item semantics are verified from source code or a catalog.
